description: The Clan Gallo-Cavalieri is a Camorra clan based in Torre Annunziata, Italy, founded in the mid-1970s by Enrico Gallo and Pasquale Gallo. It is considered one of the richest, most powerful, and most violent Camorra clans. The clan was historically opposed to the Gionta clan, leading to a bloody feud. After Enrico Gallo's death in 1985, Pasquale Gallo led the clan in a war against Valentino Gionta, which ended through the intervention of Salvatore Riina.

country_links.evidence_quote: A metà degli anni ‘90 i Cavalieri spostarono i loro affari in Spagna e Paesi Bassi gestendo il traffico della marijuana, cocaina ed eroina...
country_links.context: The clan moved its drug trafficking operations to the Netherlands.
